display.purpose: Home hero headline. Two-line, second line accent-tinted.

body.purpose: Site chrome, home archive head, footer.

prose.purpose: Post and page reading surface. Larger than UI body on purpose.

label.purpose: Every meta signal: dates, read-time, kickers, captions, tag pills.

shadows.name: wordmark-inset
shadows.purpose: Brushed-metal effect on the wordmark monogram block. Only standing shadow in the system.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Smoother decel for image hovers and slower reveals.

motion.name: dur-1
motion.purpose: Quick state changes: hover color, focus.

motion.name: dur-2
motion.purpose: Standard transition: nav underline grow, post-card title tint, header scrim fade.

motion.name: dur-3
motion.purpose: Slow reveal: post-card image saturation/scale, hero entrance.

components.name: Wordmark
components.description: Site identity. Brushed-silver monogram block + name. Rotates -6deg on hover.
components.html: K·HKerry Hatcher
components.css: .ds-wordmark { display: inline-flex; align-items: baseline; gap: .65rem; text-decoration: none; color: oklch(0.92 0.004 250); font-family: "Noto Sans", -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-wordmark__mark { display: inline-grid; place-items: center; width: 2rem; height: 2rem; border-radius: 6px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.86 0.005 250) 0%, oklch(0.7 0.008 245) 55%, oklch(0.86 0.005 250) 100%); color: oklch(0.2 0.03 252); font-family: Menlo, Courier, monospace; font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; transform: translateY(.15rem); transition: transform 360ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), filter 360ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 oklch(1 0 0 / 0.35), inset 0 -1px 0 oklch(0 0 0 / 0.15), 0 0 0 1px oklch(1 0 0 / 0.06); } .ds-wordmark:hover .ds-wordmark__mark { transform: translateY(.15rem) rotate(-6deg); filter: brightness(1.06); } .ds-wordmark__name { font-size: 1rem; }

components.name: Prose Link
components.description: Canonical link affordance across the site. Growing underline via background-size. No text-decoration.
components.html: For example, the FY27 BCSD budget analysis walks through the math.
components.css: .ds-link { color: oklch(0.88 0.1 230); text-decoration: none; background-image: linear-gradient(currentColor, currentColor); background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: 0 100%; background-size: 100% 1px; transition: color 240ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), background-size 360ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-link:hover, .ds-link:focus-visible { color: oklch(0.78 0.14 240); background-size: 100% 2px; outline: none; }

components.name: Tag Pill
components.description: Inline post tag. Mono, uppercase-feel, pill border, never interactive.
components.css: .ds-tag { padding: .2rem .55rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.42 0.024 252); border-radius: 999px; color: oklch(0.6 0.008 248); font-family: Menlo, Courier, monospace; font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Pager Page Pill (current)
components.description: Current-page indicator in the home pagination trail. Accent fill, paper text.
components.html:
1. 1
  2. 2
  3. 3
components.css: .ds-pager-page { display: inline-grid; place-items: center; min-width: 2.2rem; height: 2.2rem; padding: 0 .55rem; font-family: Menlo, Courier, monospace; font-size: .85rem; color: oklch(0.6 0.008 248); text-decoration: none; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid transparent; transition: color 360ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 360ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), background 360ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-pager-page:hover { color: oklch(0.92 0.004 250); border-color: oklch(0.32 0.022 252); } .ds-pager-page--current { color: oklch(0.17 0.03 252); background: oklch(0.78 0.14 240); border-color: oklch(0.78 0.14 240); font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Subscribe Button
components.description: The only real button in the system. Lives inside .kg-signup-card from Ghost-imported content. No general primary button exists site-wide.
components.css: .ds-btn-subscribe { padding: .65rem 1.1rem; background: oklch(0.78 0.14 240); color: oklch(0.17 0.03 252); border: 0; border-radius: 6px; font-family: "Noto Sans", -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 240ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-subscribe:hover { background: oklch(0.88 0.1 230); } .ds-btn-subscribe:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.78 0.14 240); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Skip Link
components.description: Accessibility-required skip-to-main affordance. Hidden via transform until focus.
components.css: .ds-skip { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; padding: .5rem 1rem; background: oklch(0.92 0.004 250); color: oklch(0.17 0.03 252); font-family: Menlo, Courier, monospace; font-size: .8125rem; transform: translateY(-110%); transition: transform 240ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); z-index: 100; text-decoration: none; } .ds-skip:focus { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Section Kicker (Numbered)
components.description: Signature mono section marker. Used as a leading glyph on the archive head and as the visual rhythm device throughout the site.
components.css: .ds-archive__title { font-family: "Noto Sans", -apple-system, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 1.4vw, 1.25rem); letter-spacing: -0.005em; color: oklch(0.92 0.004 250); display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: .9rem; margin: 0; } .ds-archive__kicker { font-family: Menlo, Courier, monospace; font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.78 0.14 240); }

components.name: Reading Progress Bar
components.description: Fixed 2px top bar on post pages. Width tracks article scroll-through via JS. Functional, not decorative.
components.css: .ds-reading-progress { position: relative; height: 2px; background: transparent; z-index: 60; pointer-events: none; } .ds-reading-progress__bar { height: 100%; background: oklch(0.78 0.14 240); transform-origin: left center; transition: width 80ms linear; }

narrative.overview:
Mono kickers, numbered section markers (§ 02), and a single luminous blue feel like reasoning done in front of you. The aesthetic is provenance: nothing claims more than it can show. The page is deep ink-blue paper with silver type; the accent is held back so that when it appears — in a link, a section number, a hovered card, the reading-progress bar at the top of a post — it reads as emphasis, not decoration.

This is not a magazine, not a SaaS landing page, not a developer-portfolio dark mode, not a campaign site, not a Substack template. It is a self-owned reading space that happens to be dark by default because of the room: a 13-inch laptop in a study with one desk lamp on, late evening. Light mode is a courtesy for daytime mobile readers, not a hedge.
keyCharacteristics: One typographic family across the surface (Noto Sans), letting hierarchy come from weight and scale rather than family contrast.
Mono labels (Menlo) carry every meta signal: dates, read-time, page numbers, section kickers, captions.
A single committed accent — luminous mid-blue — does all the identity work. No secondary brand colors.
The wordmark mark is a small brushed-silver square with K·H in mono; the only "logo" the site has.
Layout breathes: clamp-based gutters, a 70ch reading measure, and a three-zone post body grid.
Motion is choreographed, never decorative: scroll-stagger reveals, reading-progress bar, sticky-header scrim, growing-underline links.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: A single accent (Luminous Mid-Blue) carries the entire brand. Adding a second saturated color makes this site look like a startup.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Neutral Rule
rules.body: No #000, no #fff, no oklch(L 0 H) anywhere. Every neutral tints toward the brand hue (chroma 0.004–0.03).

rules.name: The Reading Measure Rule
rules.body: Long-form prose lives inside 70ch. Wider columns are reserved for figures that have earned the room. The post body uses a three-zone grid (main / wide / full).

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is built from weight and scale within Noto Sans + Menlo. No third display font, no serif body, no italic-script display.

rules.name: The Mono-For-Meta Rule
rules.body: Every meta signal is in Menlo, uppercase, with 0.06–0.14em tracking. Body sentences are never in mono.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Hover and focus may introduce a 1–2px transform; that is the system's only motion-on-state.

rules.name: The No-Glassmorphism Rule
rules.body: The single backdrop-filter in the system is a functional scrim on the sticky header. Decorative blurs are prohibited.

dos: Do use one accent (Luminous Mid-Blue) across the whole system. New states get weight and label changes, not new hues.
Do keep prose inside 70ch. Figures may expand into wide or full; paragraphs may not.
Do use Menlo, uppercase, 0.06–0.14em tracked for every meta signal.
Do use the growing-underline link treatment via background-size.
Do tint every neutral toward the brand hue (chroma 0.004–0.03).
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion on every animation.
Do add a print stylesheet (PRODUCT.md commitment, not yet implemented).
Do plan for a reader-mode toggle or alternate body-font affordance (PRODUCT.md commitment, not yet implemented).
Do keep the wordmark monogram as the only logo.
donts: Don't introduce a second saturated brand color.
Don't use #000 or #fff in CSS or in SVG.

Don't add border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent. Two existing components (.prose blockquote and .kg-callout-card) already violate this rule (3px accent left border). They are documented divergences slated for revision; don't propagate the pattern.
Don't add a serif display, italic-script display, or third type family.
Don't use mono inside body sentences.
Don't add decorative shadows, gradient text, or glassmorphism panels.
Don't ship a SaaS landing surface, a magazine clone, a developer-portfolio terminal aesthetic, or default Jekyll theme chrome.
Don't add a campaign frame (endorsement bars, donate CTAs, yard-sign red/white/blue, Meet Kerry hero bio).
Don't add a Substack/Medium author-template stack.
Don't add a local-news-site aesthetic (sidebars, recent-comments widgets, most-read-this-week).
Don't add a Read more → CTA at the end of post excerpts.
Don't add a profile photo in the hero.
Don't auto-play background gradients, conic-gradient blob heros, or scroll-tied parallax.
Don't add third-party widgets (chat, surveilling analytics, social embeds beyond Ghost's card system).
